decisions.title: Migrate Explore 1 File Viewer to Explore 2 Media Player
decisions.context: ENG-4419 represents core functionality migration from E1→E2. Critical for 'Nail the Core' pillar and sunsetting E1. Impacts user workflows and adoption metrics.

arguments.for: Enables E1 deprecation, unifies UX, reduces maintenance burden, improves E2 feature parity
arguments.against: High effort, risk of regression, potential user retraining needed

decisions.title: Resolve Catalog SQLite WAL Accumulation Bug
decisions.context: ENG-9114 indicates critical data integrity issue—WAL checkpoint never runs due to pause guard scoping bug. Threatens 'Nail the Core' stability and could cause data loss/performance degradation.

arguments.for: Prevents data corruption, improves system reliability, unblocks catalog performance
arguments.against: Requires deep debugging, potential production hotfix risk

decisions.title: Implement Data-Only Mode in Data-Batcher (Sift Edge)
decisions.context: ENG-8309 supports local data processing for Sift Edge. Critical for 'Build the Moat' with edge computing differentiation and offline capabilities.

arguments.for: Enables edge use cases, reduces cloud dependency, competitive differentiator
arguments.against: Adds architectural complexity, potential sync issues with cloud

decisions.title: Resolve PostgreSQL Parameter Limit in Channel Policy Evaluation
decisions.context: ENG-9083 blocks data export scalability—parameter limits hit during channel policy evaluation. Impacts 'Embed Deeper' by limiting data integration capabilities.
decisions.blockedBy: Need architecture decision: pagination vs. query restructuring vs. batch processing

arguments.for: Unblocks large-scale exports, improves reliability, enables enterprise use cases
arguments.against: May require query refactor, potential performance tradeoffs

decisions.title: Add TTL for Local Catalog Partitions
decisions.context: ENG-9045 addresses data lifecycle management for local catalogs. Supports 'Nail the Core' by preventing unbounded growth and improving performance.

arguments.for: Controls storage costs, improves query performance, prevents disk exhaustion
arguments.against: Requires policy design, potential data loss if misconfigured

decisions.title: Support Channel Nesting in E2 Channel List
decisions.context: ENG-8512 improves UX for customers with many similarly-named channels. Supports 'Nail the Core' by reducing cognitive load and improving signal discovery.

arguments.for: Improves UX, reduces clutter, scales to large channel counts
arguments.against: May confuse users expecting flat list, requires UX iteration

keyResults.name: E2 Feature Parity (E1 migration blockers resolved)

thisWeek.weekSummary: Meeting-heavy week (80% scheduled). Need to carve out 4+ contiguous hours for ENG-4419 E1→E2 migration planning and ENG-9114 WAL bug resolution. Consider declining or delegating 3 status meetings.
